name: amazon_oos_wholesale
description: Wholesale plays where Amazon has effectively abandoned the listing. Sustained Amazon out-of-stock, FBA sellers maintaining the listing, healthy BSR. Each shortlisted ASIN goes to supplier outreach to negotiate trade.
thesis: Amazon has stopped selling — brand wants resellers — we negotiate trade pricing.
notes: AMAZON_outOfStock checkbox sets the 'Amazon currently OOS' boolean. Combined with the seller-count window and monthly-sold floor, captures the abandoned-but-still-selling pattern.
monthlySold ≥ 50 is the velocity floor that confirms the absence is sustained, not a 1-day glitch.

If a verified `outOfStockPercentage90_AMAZON` field key turns up at runtime, append a {filter: 70, filterTo: null, type: greaterThanOrEqual} block under url_filters and save-back to keepa-finder-values.md per the skill's save-back rule.
compute_stability_score flows into 04_calculate.config — populates stability_score column in output (informational, does not gate).
